title: dillenia ochreata
intro: Dillenia ochreata, also known as the Yellow Bird Lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dillenia ochreata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, among others. Herbal preparations of Dillenia ochreata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
